faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our plans
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our plans

items.question: Can I change plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: We offer a trial for Voyager. No credit card required to get started.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept major credit cards, PayPal and other local methods depending on your region.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel anytime and keep access until the end of your billing period.

items.question: How do you protect my data?
items.answer: We use encryption and follow best practices to protect your data.

items.question: How does the share bonus work?
items.answer: By sharing you can receive extra Explorer credits.

items.question: What does unlimited mean?
items.answer: With Voyager you have no monthly limit for AI generations used for planning.

q1.title: Can I change plans anytime?
q1.description: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and you'll be charged proportionally.

q2.title: Is there a free trial period?
q2.description: We offer a 14-day free trial for the Premium plan. No credit card required to get started.

q3.title: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.description: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, bank transfers, and other local payment methods depending on your region.

q4.title: Can I cancel anytime?
q4.description: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no cancellation fees and you'll retain access to premium features until the end of your billing period.

q5.title: How do you protect my data?
q5.description: We take data security very seriously. We use bank-level encryption and follow industry best security practices.
q5.linkText: Learn more about our privacy policy
